articles.content: The 24-year-old man was already unconscious and subsequently died, said the police. Based on preliminary investigations, the police said they do not suspect foul play. Investigations are ongoing

articles.title: Egypt uncovers lost Byzantine-era city in the western desert
articles.content: Along with the strategic Suez Canal, tourism is a major source of foreign currency in the cash-strapped country. The unearthed quarters included north-south thoroughfares intersected by east-west streets, forming open squares and public spaces, said Hisham el-Leithy, secretary general of the supreme council of antiquities.

articles.title: 1,776 suspects hauled up for police investigations after checks on 17,000 people in June
articles.content: Singapore's law enforcement agencies conducted checks on more than 17,000 people in June, resulting in 1,776 suspects being hauled up for investigations. Of these, 519 were arrested. The police worked closely with the Central Narcotics Bureau (CNB), the Singapore Civil Defence Force (SCDF), the Land Transport Authority and the Health Sciences Authority (HSA). The offences targeted included vice activities, traffic violations, vaporiser-related crimes, immigration offences and illegal employment. The police conducted several raids against public...
